caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue and white striped shirt and black over-ear headphones, speaks while looking toward the camera. She is positioned in an indoor setting with light-colored walls and pale yellow curtains with a blue border to her left. A light-colored piece of furniture is partially visible in the background behind her. The text "Nancy Ramya" is displayed in the bottom left corner of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, though her facial expressions shift as she talks, with her mouth opening and closing and her gaze slightly fluctuating. Her overall demeanor remains steady as she continues speaking into the microphone of her headset.
